This page lists the IAM roles and permissions for Recommender. To search through all roles and permissions, see the [role and permission index](https://docs.cloud.google.com/iam/docs/roles-permissions) .

<tr class="even">
<td><h4 id="recommender.alloydbAdmin" class="role-title add-link" data-text="AlloyDB Recommender Admin" tabindex="-1">AlloyDB Recommender Admin</h4>
